subcodes.first_line: O Mary! Upon thee be the Glory of God, the Lord of Eternity. From the heaven of divine Will thou didst seek forgiveness. Verily, He hath forgiven thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مریم علیک بهاء الله مالک القدم از سماء مشیت الهی طلب مغفرت نمودی انه غفرک و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
